items.title: Apple calls OpenAI's hardware business 'rotten to its core' in trade secret theft lawsuit
items.summary: The lawsuit also names io Products, the hardware company led by Jony Ive.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
items.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that former employees that now work for the AI company have stolen Apple's trade secrets "for the benefit of OpenAI." In its complaint, Apple all...

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.
